summary: Front‑row balcony audience recording that captures an amazing Dark Star with solid overall sound.
review: The three reviewers all give the show four stars, praising both the performance—especially a stellar Dark Star—and the quality of the balcony‑mic capture.  No technical flaws are reported, and the recording is described as “great,” suggesting a clear and well‑balanced audience source that does justice to an already great concert.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are uniformly positive (4 ★) and highlight both the show’s musical high point and a good‑quality recording, giving confidence in a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from front‑row balcony on both sets; reviewers note no issues and call the recording great, implying clear audience capture with good balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not specifically discussed, but reviewers note the recording covers the first set from left‑center and the second set from right‑center balcony positions, indicating good coverage of both halves.
